action.reasoning: Observation: The most recent comprehensive double-pass alpha search (iter 25) showed that double-pass inference is slightly worse than single-pass on validation (2.8407 vs 2.8490). Previous training/adapter attempts consistently degraded performance below the pretrained MetricGAN+ baseline of test PESQ 3.134. With 5 iterations and ~3.3h remaining, I need a zero-risk inference tweak that actually helps. A likely untested discrepancy is that SpeechBrain's `enhance_file` method internally normalizes audio via `audio_normalizer`, while my manual `enhance_batch` call does not. If the pretrained model expects peak-normalized inputs, this normalization gap could matter. I will run a fast exploration script on a 50-file validation subset testing: (1) no lengths arg, (2) peak/RMS normalization before enhance_batch, (3) soft clipping, (4) TTA via input scaling, (5) sliding-window overlap-add, (6) the official `enhance_file` path, and (7) inspect hyperparams.yaml for any tunable knobs. If any variant improves over baseline by >0.01, I'll validate it on the full set and submit.

command_output.stdout:
hyperparams.yaml length: 1121
# STFT parameters
sample_rate: 16000
win_length: 32
hop_length: 16
n_fft: 512
window_fn: !name:torch.hamming_window

compute_stft: !new:speechbrain.processing.features.STFT
    sample_rate: !ref <sample_rate>
    n_fft: !ref <n_fft>
    win_length: !ref <win_length>
    hop_length: !ref <hop_length>
    window_fn: !ref <window_fn>

compute_istft: !new:speechbrain.processing.features.ISTFT
    sample_rate: !ref <sample_rate>
    n_fft: !ref <n_fft>
    win_length: !ref <win_length>
    hop_length: !ref <hop_length>
    window_fn: !ref <window_fn>

spectral_magnitude: !name:speechbrain.processing.features.spectral_magnitude
    power: 0.5

resynth: !name:speechbrain.processing.signal_processing.resynthesize
    stft: !ref <compute_stft>
    istft: !ref <compute_istft>

enhance_model: !new:speechbrain.lobes.models.MetricGAN.EnhancementGenerator
    input_size: !ref <n_fft> // 2 + 1
    hidden_size: 200
    num_layers: 2
    dropout: 0

modules:
    enhance_model: !ref <enhance_model>

pretrainer: !new:speechbrain.utils.parameter_transfer.Pretrainer
    loadables:
        enhance_model: !ref <enhance_model>

baseline                       PESQ=2.8637
